headline: nVent Electric Surges 49% YTD: Should You Still Buy the Stock?
summary: NVT surges 49.3% YTD on strong data center and power utility demand, with expanding capacity and record backlog supporting its long-term growth outlook.

headline: Jim Cramer on TE Connectivity: “I Think the Stock Should Be Higher”
summary: TE Connectivity plc (NYSE:TEL) was among the stocks on Jim Cramer’s Mad Money radar as he taught investors how to profit from the upcoming wave of takeovers.
